question: Analyze my resume and tell me how can I improve my projects section?
answer: To improve your projects section, consider adding more details about the impact and outcomes of each project, such as the "measurable improvements in user engagement and usability" mentioned in your experience at Erudite Coaching Centre. You can also emphasize your technical skills, like "optimized state management using React Hooks and Context API" in the AI-Powered Chatbot Web Application project. Additionally, highlighting specific technologies used, like "React.js, Node.js, REST API, AI Integration" in the chatbot project, can help showcase your expertise.
